info.title: GL.iNet Router 4.x API — wg-client module
info.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 API exposed at POST /rpc on GL.iNet routers. All methods use JSON-RPC method `call` with params = [sid, module, function, args?]. Auth is a separate challenge/login flow yielding `sid`.

err_code.description: Error Code(-10：parameter missing -11：Invalid name length (more than 64 bytes) -12：name empty -13：uci config missing -14: password missing -15：Failed to get azirevpn configuration -16：invalid username or password -17：unknown provider -18: azirevpn IP limit reached)
Error Code(-19：parameter missing -20：too long -21：empty name -22：uci config missing -23：invalid port)
Error Code(-31：parameter missing -32：too long -33：name empty -34：uci config missing -35：invalid port)

methods.name: wg-client.clear_config_list
methods.summary: remove all wireguard client config of a group

methods.name: wg-client.get_config_list
methods.summary: get wireguard client config list of a group

auth_type.description: Authentication type - 0: no username/password or account required 1: username/password 2: account

err_code.description: Error Code(-51：parameter missing -52：vpn conflict -53：obsolete -54：wgclient not installed -55：init script missing -56：uci config missing -57：client not found)

group_type.description: group type 1:preconfigured group 2:manually added group 3:group added by app

auth_type.description: Authentication type - 0: no username/password or account required 1: username/password 2: account

methods.name: wg-client.get_all_config_list
methods.summary: get wireguard client config list of all groups

auth_type.description: Authentication type - 0: no username/password or account required 1: username/password 2: account

methods.name: wg-client.get_route_list
methods.summary: get wireguard client custom route list

err_code.description: Error Code(-10：parameter missing -11：uci config missing -12：group missing -13：password missing -14：country info empty -15：unknown provider)
